question: Will Jerome Powell be appointed to a third term as Chair of the Federal Reserve?
textDescription:
Powell’s term expires May 15, 2026. This market will resolve to YES if he is nominated and confirmed for a third consecutive term as Chair of the Board Of Governors of the Federal Reserve. 

It will resolve no if he resigns or is replaced as Chair of the Federal Reserve before getting nominated and confirmed for a third consecutive term.
newsShortReason: Jerome Powell's term as Chair ended on May 15, 2026; Kevin Warsh was confirmed as his successor.
newsKeyEvidence: On May 13, 2026, the U.S. Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the new Chair of the Federal Reserve, succeeding Jerome Powell. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/business/2026/may/13/kevin-warsh-federal-reserve-chair?utm_source=openai)) | On May 15, 2026, the Federal Reserve Board named Powell as Chair pro tempore until Warsh is sworn in. ([federalreserve.gov](https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/other20260515a.htm?utm_source=openai))
